ddls:
CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the speaker */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the speaker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the speaker */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the speaker */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile of the speaker */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker giving the presentation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the presentation */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date of the presentation */,
  "presentation_time" TEXT /* Time of the presentation */,
  "presentation_format" TEXT /* Format of the presentation (e.g., oral, poster, workshop) */,
  "presentation_category" TEXT /* Category of the presentation (e.g., keynote, plenary, parallel session) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts_of_interest" (
  "coi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict of interest */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker disclosing the conflict */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of conflict of interest (e.g., receipt of grants, employment, stock ownership) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict of interest */,
  "coi_date" TEXT /* Date of the conflict of interest */,
  "coi_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the conflict of interest (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_of_interest_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coi_types" (
  "coi_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict of interest type */,
  "coi_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the conflict of interest type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict of interest type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coi_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_coi" (
  "speaker_coi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker-COI relationship */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker disclosing the conflict */,
  "coi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict of interest disclosed */,
  "coi_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of conflict of interest disclosed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_coi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_coi_coi_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("coi_type_id") REFERENCES coi_types ("coi_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_coi_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_coi_coi_id FOREIGN KEY ("coi_id") REFERENCES conflicts_of_interest ("coi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., conference organizer, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission granted (e.g., view speaker info, edit coi disclosures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_reviews_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "evaluation_text" TEXT /* Text of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker being commented */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_comments_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_topics" (
  "speaker_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker-topic relationship */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of interest of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_topics_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_keywords" (
  "speaker_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker-keyword relationship */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_keywords_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_publications" (
  "speaker_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker-publication relationship */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_publications_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)
